name: Bounty of Solitude
description:
Increases the resource value of nearby gold veins, stone outcroppings, and berry bushes by +5% every 30 seconds up to a maximum of +60%.
Trees are increased at a lesser rate of +2.5% up to +30%.
After 330 seconds, generates resources equal to 5% of the current resources in those nearby deposits. Additionally generates 5% of the maximum resources of each deposit when fully gathered.
